introSection: Rioolrat is a steel roller coaster located at Avonturenpark Hellendoorn in Hellendoorn, Overijssel, Netherlands. It reaches a maximum height of 10 metres, has a top speed of 45 km/h and has a length of 305 metres.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was custom built by Vekoma to fit in the existing Rioolrat building. This building previously housed the old Rioolrat.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content:
The ride is themed to the sewers, with a walkthrough portion at the beginning of the ride. This walkthrough is very reminiscent of the old walkthrough portion for Rat Ride in Lightwater Valley. The ride contains a few effects, such as lasers and an encounter with a Metro. The ride used to ride through a slime covered metro station, but this scene has been removed at some point.

On Halloween, the ride gets a overlay, becoming Bloody underground, featuring Scare Actors in the walkthrough and featuring music during the ride, this music was removed in 2019 however.

fullText:
Rioolrat is a steel roller coaster located at Avonturenpark Hellendoorn in Hellendoorn, Overijssel, Netherlands. It reaches a maximum height of 10 metres, has a top speed of 45 km/h and has a length of 305 metres.

The ride was custom built by Vekoma to fit in the existing Rioolrat building. This building previously housed the old Rioolrat.



Dark blue track and supports.



The ride is themed to the sewers, with a walkthrough portion at the beginning of the ride. This walkthrough is very reminiscent of the old walkthrough portion for Rat Ride in Lightwater Valley. The ride contains a few effects, such as lasers and an encounter with a Metro. The ride used to ride through a slime covered metro station, but this scene has been removed at some point.

On Halloween, the ride gets a overlay, becoming Bloody underground, featuring Scare Actors in the walkthrough and featuring music during the ride, this music was removed in 2019 however.

"Rioolrat" translates to "Sewer Rat".
